title: [RC-WS1.1] python3 preload profiling harness

freshness_state.generator_command: scripts/profile_python3_preload.sh produces target/perf/python3_preload_profile/ with baseline/strict/hardened hot_symbols.json and python3_preload_profile_summary.json

test_coverage.harness_functional: profile_python3_preload.sh generates deterministic hot-symbol lists for baseline, strict, and hardened modes
test_coverage.artifact_structure: Each run produces timestamped directory with hot_symbols.json per mode and a summary.json with timing ratios
test_coverage.reproducibility: Re-runs of the harness produce consistent top-N symbol rankings (verified via symbol identity matching)

done_when_evidence: Summary JSON shows timing ratios and hot-symbol deltas
Harness identifies strict-only and hardened-only hot symbols (membrane overhead candidates)
backfill_note: Harness already existed and was functional; completion contract formalizes evidence.
